checksRun.name: functional-components
checksRun.command: curl localhost:5199/components (showcase page renders all 9 components)

handoff.handoffNotes: All 9 UI components implemented per research plan following HOW.md Pattern 6 (variant class composition). Every component has TypeScript props interfaces, dark mode support, and interactive components have focus:ring-2 states and keyboard accessibility. Dropdown integrates useClickOutside from Task 3. ComponentShowcase page added at /components for visual verification. Modal, SlideOver, and Toast stubs left unchanged (out of scope). Zero TypeScript errors, clean production build.
